subcodes.first_line: O Ramadan! Upon thee be the glory of the All-Merciful! In this blessed month the chosen ones of this earth are honored with the true fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رمضان علیک بهاء الرحمن در این ماه مبارک اولیای این ارض بشرف صوم حقیقی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @law of fasting, @prayer for strength, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
